calendar.matters:
Amended Notice Of Hearing On Petitioners Petition For Order Confirming Arbitration Award - C.C.P. 1285 Et Seq.
Off Calendar Feb-27-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Alexandra Azad (via Zoom) for Respondent/Moving party JOSEPH E. FIGONE, SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE OF THE LIANA G. FIGONE SEPARATE PROPERTY REVOCABLE TRUST.

Hearing is held. Argued re: late filed notice of errata and fees. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument modifies the tenatative ruling as follows:

RESPONDENT JOSEPH FIGONE , SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE OF THE LIANA G. FIGONE SEPARATE PROPERTY REVOCABLE TRUST Amended Notice Of Hearing On Petitioners Petition For Order Confirming Arbitration Award - C.C.P. 1285 Et Seq.is GRANTED. Final Arbitration award shall be the judgment of this Court. Moving party is entitled to interest from January 13, 2026. Request for attorney's fees incurred in conjunction with this petition is denied without prejudice. Moving party failed to cite a contractual provision supporting the request for fees. Paragraph 31 of the Purchase and Sale Agreement referenced in the moving papers (5:20) does not mention attorney's fees. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles Haines, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not reported (D501)

MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

NOTICE OF MOTION AND PETITION TO APPOINT DISPUTE RESOLUTION SERVICE PROVIDER is continued to October 4, 2024. No later than September 30, 2024 parties to file a joint declaration indicating (1) a jointly selected arbitrator; or (2) that parties were not able to agree. The Court nominates the following persons from the lists supplied by the parties: Nathan D. Mihra (Ret.); Hon. Kevin Murphy (Ret.); Hon. Leslie Nichols (Ret.); Hon. Winifred Smith (Ret.); Hon. Victoria Wood (Ret.).

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
